hooks.command: PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shrinkage/scripts/codemap.py" refresh --auto 2>/dev/null; true
PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); if [ -n "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/guard_staging.py"; fi
